REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT 460 FRANCISCO ST. H.O.A.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND FOR PLAINTIFF TO (1) CLEARLY INDICATE WHICH CAUSE OF ACTION IS ALLEGED AGAINST WHICH DEFENDANT; (2) ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT, I.E. DID THE HOA FAIL TO MAINTAIN/OR REPAIR/OR INSURE THE COMMON AREAS; HOW DID THIS FAILURE CAUSE DAMAGE TO THE PLAINTIFF; WHAT IS THE DAMAGE; (3) ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF CAUSES OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT AND INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DEFAMATION IS MOOT. PLAINTIFF CONCEDES THAT THIS CAUSE OF ACTION IS NOT ASSERTED AGAINST THE MOVING DEFENDANT. AMENDED COMPLAINT SHALL SO CLEARLY INDICATE. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: KENNETH B. HUNT; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

Off Calendar May-26-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

George Morris; Phillips, Spallas & Angstadt LLP; 415-278-9400; appearing as counsel for defendant 460 Francisco Street HOA.

No other appearances. Defendant contests the court's tentative ruling, and request that the court make a ruling on their motion today. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT 460 FRANCISCO STREET HOA'S MOTION TO DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO CAL. RULE OF COURT RULE 3.1385, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, TO ENFORCE THE SETTLEMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 is OFF CALENDAR for department 501. OSC Re: dismissal set for hearing in department 610 for June 6, 2023.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Off Calendar Jun-11-2021 Continued To Sep-01-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-03-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT 460 FRANCISCO ST. H.O.A.'S DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for plaintiff to (1) clearly indicate which cause of action is alleged against which defendant; (2) allege facts in support of each element of the cause of action for breach of contract, i.e. did the HOA fail to maintain/or repair/or insure the common areas; how did this failure cause damage to the plaintiff; what is the damage; (3) allege facts in support of each element of causes of action for negligent and intentional infliction of emotional distress. Demurrer to the cause of action for defamation is moot. Plaintiff concedes that this cause of action is not asserted against the moving defendant. Amended complaint shall so clearly indicate. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Jun-03-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT 460 FRANCISCO ST. H.O.A.'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike is GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) allege facts showing malice, oppression or fraud; and (2) assert contractual or statutory basis for recovery of attorney's fees. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
